I may be stupid, but what's the difference between draft pick and all pick in traphase?

all pick:
>you can pick whichever units/wheels/posses you want out of what you actually OWN
draft:
>you're given a limited number of randomly selected of the above and you and your opponent take turns picking it, nobody can pick the same thing unlike all pick
>there's also rng factor in the form of relic effect which you can check in draft (?) mark for all of them
>also you don't need to have anything if you play draft
